{{Infobox location
| name = Seishen Kingdom
| introduced = Underlord
}}

''See also: [[Seishen Kingdom Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Seishen]] [[Kingdom]] is a sovereign power led by [[King Dakata]], a ruler noted for his integrity and wisdom. The kingdom's nobility includes the first prince, [[Seishen]] [[Kiro]], and his younger brother, [[Seishen Daji]]. The royal family has also included figures such as [[Underlady]] [[Riyusai Meira]]. The kingdom maintains a presence in the [[Night Wheel Valley]], where they constructed a stone castle using [[Ruler techniques]], though it was dwarfed by the nearby [[Akura clan]] fortress. The [[Seishen]] military utilizes advanced armor and features a hierarchy of [[Golds]], [[Lords]], [[Ladies]], and Underlords. The kingdom has been involved in significant conflict, including a sudden attack and efforts to push against the [[Empire]]. During these campaigns, they sought to secure territory near a portal, though their efforts resulted in many wounded soldiers requiring care from [[Brightcrown]] healers. The kingdom's political standing shifted dramatically when they were accused by the [[Akura clan]] of conspiring to assassinate members of the [[Akura head family]]. Following these events, the [[Seishen]] royal line was effectively ended, leaving [[Seishen Daji]] as the sole surviving heir to be placed under the supervision of the [[Akura clan]].}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Situated beyond the southern jungles, the [[Seishen]] [[Kingdom]] is an elite-class state protected by the [[Akura clan]] and eyes the lands of the [[Blackflame Empire]]. During a conflict with the [[Empire]], the kingdom—led by First Prince [[Kiro]] and an [[Underlady]]—launched a feared broad attack that pushed toward the edge of the portal. This faction, which maintains a castle in [[Night Wheel Valley]] and utilizes [[sacred artists]], has recently minted Underlords and erected defenses on the other side of the portal. While they may possess ward keys for the boundary field and have benefited from [[Charity]]'s garden, [[Mercy]] has accused [[Akura Charity]] of providing them with warnings.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">20</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Seishen Kingdom]] is one of the two weakest vassal states under the [[Akura clan]]'s protection.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c4">''Underlord'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Seishen Kingdom]] is located beyond the southern jungles and eyes the [[Blackflame Empire]]'s lands.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Seishen Kingdom]] is a kingdom with an elite class.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c6">''Underlord'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Kiro]] is the first prince of the [[Seishen Kingdom]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[The Empire]] is fighting against the [[Seishen Kingdom]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c9">''Underlord'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Seishen Kingdom]] may be pushing against the [[Empire]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|There was a feared broad attack from the [[Seishen Kingdom]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c10">''Underlord'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Seishen Kingdom]] pushed to the edge of the portal.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c12">''Underlord'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Seishen Kingdom]] has an [[Underlady]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Seishen Kingdom]] is one of the factions [[Mercy]] mentions.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c13">''Underlord'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Seishen Kingdom]] may have guards or walls built to prevent passage through the portal.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c14">''Underlord'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Seishen Kingdom]] has minted Underlords in the last two months.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c15">''Underlord'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Seishen Kingdom]] has a castle located in the [[Night Wheel Valley]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c16">''Underlord'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Seishen Kingdom]] has benefited from [[Charity]]'s garden.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Seishen Kingdom]] had erected defenses on the other side of the portal.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c17">''Underlord'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Seishen Kingdom]] has [[sacred artists]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Seishen Kingdom]] likely possesses ward keys for the boundary field.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Seishen Kingdom]] follows the [[Blackflame Empire]]'s ship.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c18">''Underlord'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Seishen Kingdom]] is a location where enemies can be sent.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20">''Underlord'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Mercy]] accused [[Akura Charity]] of warning the [[Seishen Kingdom]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c21">''Underlord'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Seishen]] [[Kingdom]] is a fortified realm featuring walls draped in its own flags and various hastily built constructions. Within this territory, the home of [[Prince Daji]], [[Soulsmiths]] design constructs while [[Golds]] utilize cloudships for scouting missions. As [[Lindon]] arrives to find prepared rooms and scavenges plates from the kingdom, he carries samples of their armor within his [[soulspace]]. During combat, the kingdom's Underlords fight alongside [[Pride]] and [[Mercy]], though the violence of such encounters can leave an [[Underlord]] lying in pieces on the floor.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">13</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] kept samples of armor from the [[Seishen Kingdom]] in his [[soulspace]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c9">''Wintersteel'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Seishen Kingdom]]'s flags fly over the fortress wall.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Seishen Kingdom]] prepares rooms for [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Seishen Kingdom]] has walls.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c10">''Wintersteel'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Seishen Kingdom]] has a tiny cloudship.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Seishen Kingdom]] has constructions that look hastily built.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Seishen Kingdom]] has [[Golds]] who scout in cloudships.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c12">''Wintersteel'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Seishen Kingdom]] is the home of [[Prince Daji]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] scavenged plates from the [[Seishen Kingdom]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c13">''Wintersteel'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Seishen Kingdom]] has [[Soulsmiths]] who design constructs.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c20">''Wintersteel'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Talking with the [[Seishen Kingdom]] would be uncomfortable for [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26">''Wintersteel'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Pride]] and [[Mercy]] fight side-by-side with the [[Seishen Kingdom]] Underlords.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27">''Wintersteel'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|A [[Seishen Kingdom]] [[Underlord]] lay in pieces on the floor.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Meira]] is the [[Underlady]] of the [[Seishen Kingdom]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c3">''Bloodline'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Seishen Kingdom]] raised a fortress at the border of [[Sky's Edge]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c4">''Bloodline'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Seishen]] [[Kingdom]] is a sovereign nation that faces an uncertain future due to the actions of [[Daji]], who is considered the son of the kingdom. These actions have placed the entire realm in significant danger. Because the [[Seishen]] [[Kingdom]] has no remaining heirs, it is destined to become a vassal country of the [[Akura clan]].}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">5</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Seishen Kingdom]] has no further heirs.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c9">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Seishen Kingdom]] is to become a vassal country of the [[Akura clan]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Daji]] is the son of the [[Seishen Kingdom]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Daji]]'s actions put the [[Seishen Kingdom]] in danger.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Seishen Kingdom]] is a kingdom.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c14">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|“Congratulations to the Seishen Kingdom,” Charity said. “It seems you have benefited greatly from my garden.”<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c16" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|“You warned the Seishen Kingdom,” Mercy accused her,<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c21" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Nations and empires]]
